---
title: "Data with Will"
subtitle: "The Data Songbook"
image: assets/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/canadasung
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/williamwnsong
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:canadasung@gmail.com
---

[繁體中文](index-zh.html)

Greetings! My name is William Song, a data scientist and analyst based in Vancouver, BC, Canada.

My work sits at the intersection of business analytics, statistical modeling, data engineering, and visualization.

Like many of you, AI (LLMs in particular) has impacted my workflow in profound ways, and I am excited about the possibilities it opens up for data professionals. Also, I am aware of the potential risks it poses, technical-wise (security risk) and skill-wise (skill atrophy). That said, I also continue to write raw SQL and Python code to practice and to solve problems from the ground up.

## Career Journey in DA/DS

- **???** | To be discovered.....

- **[KABAM](https://www.kabam.com){target="_blank"}** | Data Analyst | 2023.12 - 2025.08

- **[IGG](https://www.igg.com){target="_blank"}** | Senior Data Analyst | 2021.07 - 2023.08

- **[Blastworks Technology](https://www.blastworksinc.com/){target="_blank"}** | Game Data Analyst | 2018.09 - 2021.07

## Career Journey before DA

- **[River Rock Casino Resort](https://www.riverrockcasino.com){target="_blank"}** | Table Game Dealer | 2011.09 - 2014.07

- **[McDonald's](https://www.mcdonalds.com/ca/en-ca.html){target="_blank"}** | Crew | 2009.07 - 2011.02

- **[EHSN Taiwan CS & E-Commerce](https://www.ehsn.com.tw){target="_blank"}** | CS Agent / Product Marketing Analyst | 2003.09 - 2009.05

## Education

University of British Columbia | Vancouver, BC, Canada

- Master of Data Science (MDS) | 2025 - 2026

Simon Fraser University | Burnaby, BC, Canada

- Joint major in Business and Computer Science (BBA) | 2012 - 2018

## Resume

[Download PDF](assets/william_song_resume_2p.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
